close_reason: Already fixed: inventory closures use ?/Ok pattern with imported Arc
description: secretx-k8s/src/lib.rs:253, 261-262. .map(|b| std::sync::Arc::new(b) as std::sync::Arc<dyn secretx_core::SecretStore>) — the 'as' cast is mandatory for trait-object coercion through .map(), but 'use std::sync::Arc' at module top would shorten this. Opinion-tagged because the verbosity is harmless and the explicit path may aid grep-ability.
title: Inventory factory's 'as Arc<dyn Trait>' coercion is verbose
